summary: Iteration 68: Homepage Gradient Flow & Footer Anchor Links - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested (1) Homepage gradient flow in default order - no hard edges between adjacent light sections, (2) Section reorder via admin panel - moved Newsletter above About, saved successfully, gradient flow remained seamless after reorder, (3) Footer anchor link scrolling on homepage - 'Upcoming Programs' click scrolls correctly to target section, (4) Footer anchor link from /about page - navigates to homepage and scrolls to Upcoming Programs section.
critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx: Centralized gradient system working correctly with DARK_SECTIONS set and alternating GRADIENT_LAVENDER_TO_WHITE/GRADIENT_WHITE_TO_LAVENDER
HomePage.jsx lines 94-104: Light section gradient assignment correctly resets lightIndex after dark sections
HomePage.jsx lines 78-91: Hash-based scroll useEffect correctly handles /#upcoming etc. from other pages with 100ms timeout
Footer.jsx lines 170-187: handleMenuClick correctly handles /#hash links with navigation and setTimeout for scroll
All light section components (About, TextTestimonials, Upcoming, Sponsor, Programs, Testimonials, Newsletter) have backgrounds removed - they inherit from wrapper div in HomePage.jsx

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All gradient flows smooth, section reorder works, footer anchor links work

seed_data_creation: None - used existing section order from admin panel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Homepage gradient system uses centralized approach in HomePage.jsx. Light sections get alternating gradients (lavender→white, white→lavender) that chain seamlessly. Dark sections (Hero, Sessions, Stats) keep their own backgrounds and reset the light counter. Section reorder via admin panel Homepage tab works - changes saved to backend and reflected on homepage after refresh. Footer anchor links work both on homepage (smooth scroll) and from other pages (navigate then scroll).

homepage_gradient_flow_default.details: All light sections (About, TextTestimonials, Upcoming, Sponsor, Programs, Testimonials, Newsletter) display smooth gradient transitions with no hard edges

homepage_gradient_flow_after_reorder.details: Moved Newsletter above About via admin panel, saved successfully (Settings saved! toast appeared), gradient flow remained seamless at Newsletter→About boundary

footer_anchor_link_on_homepage.details: Clicked 'Upcoming Programs' in footer menu, page scrolled from 5481px to 1072px, Upcoming Programs section visible in viewport

footer_anchor_link_from_other_page.details: From /about page, clicked 'Upcoming Programs' in footer, navigated to homepage (URL changed from /about to /), Upcoming Programs section visible

admin_panel_section_reorder.details: Homepage tab shows all sections with up/down arrows (^ v) for reordering, Show toggle switches work, Save Changes button saves to backend successfully

gradient_transitions_inspected: Text Testimonials → Upcoming Programs: Smooth lavender/white gradient
Sponsor → Programs: No hard edge visible
Testimonials (dark) → Stats (dark): Dark sections chain correctly
Stats → Sessions: Clean transition to light section
Newsletter → About: Smooth gradient flow (after reorder)
